source_pr.title: expression: make some unstable test serial
source_pr.body:
Signed-off-by: Weizhen Wang <wangweizhen@pingcap.com>

<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #xxx

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

Some Operations will change the global variables. If parallel, it will lead to many problems. 

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- bugfix or new feature needs a release note -->

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: expression: make some unstable test serial
failure_signature: expression: make some unstable test serial
root_cause_explanation: The tests were flaky due to shared global state pollution under parallel execution: some operations in the expression integration tests mutate global variables, and when run in parallel they can interfere with each other. This PR stabilizes them by moving the affected tests to the serial suite / making them run serially to avoid cross-test interference.
fix_pattern: Avoid running global-state-mutating tests in parallel (move to serial suite or isolate global state).

evidence: evidence: expression: make some unstable test serial
